name: Solo One
explanation: An aggressive monophonic lead/bass synth: two oscillators (saw + detuned pulse) hard-synced for biting grit, feeding a snappy resonant 4-pole low-pass driven by a fast, punchy filter envelope. Cutoff, Resonance and Env Amount sweep and bite the timbre; Decay sets the snap, Detune fattens, Drive adds pre-filter grit, and the voice is mono with last-note priority while pitch tracks the keyboard.
